metadata.description: WI — an opinionated suite of engineering and automation plugins for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Copilot CLI.

plugins.name: wi
plugins.description: Opinionated dev loop built for keep-alive-driven work. /wi:scan documents and bootstraps a repo (with a mermaid architecture diagram; --refresh drift-checks the map and consolidates learnings); /wi:dev brainstorms a feature with you, designs (research skill), confirms architecture + design at one gate (auto-approvable with --auto), then implements to an open PR — arming a keep-alive loop (Claude/Codex /goal or Copilot Autopilot) so the run keeps going until the condition is met. Parallel subagent waves, isolated worktrees, ADR-NNNN decision log, token report. Soft-integrates obra/superpowers and frontend-design. /wi:rpa turns a UiPath PDD (parsed via markitdown) into a built REFramework or Maestro solution: deep TO-BE refinement, an SDD + architecture + assumptions, design gate (approve the framework and the build paradigm: XAML-only or coded), then delegates the build to the UiPath skills — one run per PDD (1..N processes), Workflow Analyzer gate.
